catalogue.title: With your pool, for its whole life.
catalogue.intro: From chemicals to equipment, lighting to automation. Presentation only — sales through our showroom and contact.

about.title: A studio devoted to water.
about.intro: Since 2017, Seçkin Havuzculuk has treated the pool not as a product but as an architectural moment — where light, stone and still water meet.
about.storyBody1: We begin with a question: what does this house, this land, this light ask for? Every pool is born as an extension of the architecture it belongs to — never chosen from a catalogue, always drawn for its place.
about.storyBody2: As a small, select team we take on few projects with great care. From site to handover, every stage is transparent and documented — because trust is as fragile as clear water.
about.principlesTitle: The three things that guide us.

principles.name: Stillness
principles.desc: Not spectacle, but calm. The best pool is the one that sits so naturally it goes unnoticed.

principles.name: Craft
principles.desc: An obsession with detail. The line of an infinity edge, the seam of a mosaic, the sound of the water — all designed.

principles.name: Continuity
principles.desc: Handover is a beginning, not an end. Years of care keep the water as clear as day one.

about.ctaTitle: Let the next water be yours.

construction.processTitle: From an idea to life's most treasured space.

steps.name: Build
steps.desc: A site run with mastery; every stage transparent, every detail recorded.

steps.name: Handover
steps.desc: Commissioning, handover, and then a lifetime maintenance guarantee.

maintenance.title: Clarity of water, uninterrupted.
maintenance.intro: A pool succeeds not on the day it is finished, but if it is still as clear as day one years later. Maintenance is the quiet guarantee of that clarity.

included.name: Chemical balance
included.desc: We measure pH, free chlorine, alkalinity and hardness on every visit and hold the water in balance — before any swing can harm skin or equipment.

included.name: Filtration & circulation
included.desc: Sand or cartridge filter cleaning, backwash, pump and valve checks. Proper circulation is the unseen engine of clarity.

included.name: Surface & floor cleaning
included.desc: Floor vacuuming by robot and by hand, wall brushing and waterline oil-band cleaning. Algae and scale are removed before they take hold.

included.name: Skimmer & line checks
included.desc: Cleaning of skimmer baskets, pump pre-filter and overflow channels — so leaves, insects and sediment never reach the system.

included.name: Equipment & automation
included.desc: Periodic checks of the heat pump, chlorination, dosing unit and lighting. Faults are caught quietly, before they grow.

included.name: Winterising & opening
included.desc: Protecting the water and draining the lines at season's end, then full recommissioning in spring. The pool passes winter unharmed.

maintenance.waterIntro: Water that looks clean may not be chemically balanced. On every visit we measure these ranges, log them, and fine-tune where needed — both comfort and equipment life depend on this balance.

waterValues.label: pH
waterValues.note: Skin and eye comfort, balanced disinfection

waterValues.label: Calcium hardness
waterValues.note: Protects the surface from wear and scale

maintenance.plansTitle: A rhythm to suit your pool.
maintenance.plansIntro: Every pool has different needs. We offer three core programmes, shaped by usage, location and season.

plans.name: Regular Maintenance
plans.desc: Chemical balance, cleaning and equipment checks on weekly or fortnightly visits. The standard programme that keeps water ready to use every day.

plans.name: Season Opening & Closing
plans.desc: Full recommissioning in spring and winterising in autumn. Water, lines and equipment are protected; the season opens without surprises.

plans.name: Emergency Response
plans.desc: Rapid diagnosis and correction for cloudy water, sudden algae or equipment failure. An on-site fix on a single call.

maintenance.rhythmBody: From weekly checks to seasonal deep service — a maintenance calendar built around your pool's size and use. Every visit is reported and every reading logged. You enjoy the water; we take on the rest.
maintenance.ctaTitle: A maintenance plan for your pool.
